page: Microsoft Azure DC32ads_v6 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCadsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture with AMD processors. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per virtual core.

This server type includes 1229 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage disks. It does not include any bundled GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The local storage capacity provides substantial space for temporary files and caching directly on the host.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio position this instance as a general-purpose option with local storage capabilities. The lack of integrated GPUs limits its use in hardware-accelerated workloads, but the combination of dedicated compute resources, 128.0 GB of memory, and local storage makes it suitable for database hosting, general-purpose application servers, and enterprise workloads requiring dedicated CPU performance.
description: Microsoft Azure DC32ads_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCadsv6 family, powered by AMD processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs and 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. The instance is equipped with 1229 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile offers a balanced allocation of compute and memory resources alongside significant local storage capacity. It is designed for general-purpose workloads, application servers, and database deployments that require dedicated CPU resources and local storage without the need for hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC32ads_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and 1229 GB of local storage on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A dedicated 32-vCPU virtual machine with 128 GB of memory and 1229 GB of local storage for general-purpose workloads.
